summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Quantum-Safe Secure Chat features. Backend APIs (36/38) working excellently with new group chat, file upload, and Redis OTP functionality. Frontend has authentication flow issues preventing full chat interface testing.

minor_bugs.issue: OTP verification timing issues with Redis TTL expiry during testing

critical_bugs.issue: Frontend authentication not completing successfully after OTP verification
critical_bugs.symptoms: Page reverts to login form after OTP submission, chat interface not loading

critical_bugs.issue: Token handling issues preventing access to chat interface

passed_tests: User registration with Redis OTP storage
Demo user login with OTP verification
NEW: Group chat creation with member selection
NEW: Group messages with AES-256 encryption
NEW: Group appears in chats list with is_group=true
NEW: File upload to Emergent Object Storage
NEW: Redis OTP storage with TTL and retry tracking
NEW: Enhanced message system with read receipts
Admin users and login logs tables
Twilio SMS fallback to demo mode
Gmail SMTP fallback to demo mode
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend authentication flow issues: 1) OTP verification not completing successfully, 2) Session/token management preventing chat interface access, 3) Investigate why page reverts to login after OTP submission

success_percentage.new_features: 95% (group chat, file upload, Redis OTP all working on backend)
